title: Childhood and the Fairy Contract
summary: Blue grows up resenting his one-armed father, nearly dies in a dungeon overflow, and is saved by the falling crystal fairy Lyriel, forming a life-defining contract.

title: Rising Adventurer and Smith
summary: Blue trains in blacksmithing and magic, joins the Adventurer Guild, and becomes a skilled dungeon and tower explorer by age twelve.

title: The Truth About Mother
summary: Rurik reveals the oath-bound sacrifice of Elaria and charges Blue with becoming strong enough to save her from the Elf King.
